flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Grand Valley State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.6k → $15.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Grand Valley State University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.3k → $21.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Grand Valley State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Grand Valley State University rose 34% between 2006 and 2009 (19.4% → 26.0%).
